title: Food
intro: Recipes, ingredients, meal planning. Ingest from URLs, Instagram, screenshots, or paste.
comingSoon.heading: Coming soon
recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.description: Browse, edit, and cook from your saved recipes.
recipes.list.intro: Search and filter your recipe library.
recipes.list.empty.title: No recipes yet.
recipes.list.error.title: Could not load recipes.
recipes.placeholder.title: Coming soon
recipes.placeholder.body: This page lands in a follow-up PR for PRD-119 (B/C/D).
recipes.detail.noCurrent.title: No published version yet.
recipes.detail.noCurrent.body: This recipe has draft versions but nothing promoted.
recipes.detail.archive.title: Archive "{{title}}"?
recipes.detail.archive.body: Archiving hides this recipe from the published list. Drafts and history are preserved.
recipes.detail.sendToList.dialog.title: Send to shopping list
recipes.detail.sendToList.error.NoIngred: This recipe has no ingredients to send.
recipes.detail.sendToList.error.TargetLi: The selected list no longer exists.
The selected list has been archived.
The selected list is not a shopping list.

recipes.detail.sendToList.error.Unknown: Could not send the recipe to the list.
recipes.versionDetail.urlMissing: Recipe or version missing from URL.
recipes.new.title: New recipe
recipes.new.intro: Paste or type your recipe DSL, then save. The slug and yield come from the @recipe header.
recipes.new.compileError: Recipe saved, but it didn't compile. Fix the inline errors and save again.
recipes.edit.title: Edit "{{slug}}"
recipes.edit.compileFailed: Draft saved, but it didn't compile.
recipes.edit.promoteFailed.ConcurrentPro: Promotion lost a race with another save. Refresh and retry.
recipes.edit.promoteFailed.CannotPromote: Can't promote — the draft hasn't compiled yet. Save first.
recipes.edit.promoteFailed.VersionNotFou: Draft was deleted by someone else. Reload the page.
recipes.edit.discardConfirm: Discard this draft? It will be archived.
recipes.edit.autoCreated.title: Created {{count}} new ingredient(s).
recipes.drafts.title: Drafts of "{{slug}}"
recipes.drafts.intro: Each row is a separate version. Promote one to set it as the current recipe.
recipes.drafts.empty.title: No drafts yet.
recipes.drafts.row.discardConfirm: Discard this draft? It will be archived.
recipes.draftEdit.urlMissing: Recipe or draft number missing from URL.
data.title: Manage data
data.description: Ingredients, aliases, prep states, substitutions, and conversions.
data.intro: Curate the ingredients, variants, aliases, prep states, substitutions, and unit conversions referenced by your recipes.
data.pending: Tab content lands in a follow-up PR.
data.tags.heading: Tags vocabulary
data.tags.description: Read-only view of every tag used across your ingredients. Tag editing lives on the Ingredients tab.
data.tags.empty: No tags yet. Add tags to ingredients on the Ingredients tab.
data.tags.detail.prompt: Pick a tag on the left to see the ingredients carrying it.
data.ingredients.tags.heading: Tags
data.ingredients.tags.error.BadTagFormat: Tag must be lowercase letters, digits, underscores, or dashes — segments joined by ':' (e.g. store-section:produce).
data.ingredients.title: Ingredients
data.ingredients.description: Canonical ingredients, their hierarchy, and embedded variants.
data.ingredients.selectionPrompt: Pick an ingredient on the left to see its details.
data.ingredients.variants.heading: Variants
data.ingredients.variants.empty: No variants for this ingredient yet.
data.ingredients.variants.name: Name
data.ingredients.create.title: Create ingredient
data.ingredients.create.name: Name
data.ingredients.create.error.slugTaken: That slug is already in use.
data.ingredients.create.error.invalidSlu: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits, and dashes (e.g. olive-oil).
data.ingredients.create.error.cycle: That parent choice would form a cycle.
data.ingredients.create.error.generic: Could not create the ingredient. Please try again.
data.ingredients.rename.title: Rename ingredient slug
data.ingredients.rename.description: Recipes referencing this slug in their DSL will fail to compile until edited — but existing compiled recipe lines stay linked.
data.ingredients.rename.error.generic: Could not rename the ingredient. Please try again.
data.ingredients.changeParent.error.gene: Could not move the ingredient. Please try again.
data.ingredients.changeParent.title: Change parent ingredient
data.ingredients.changeParent.descriptio: Move this ingredient elsewhere in the hierarchy. Depth is capped at three levels.
data.ingredients.changeParent.label: New parent
data.ingredients.delete.title: Delete ingredient
data.ingredients.delete.confirmPrompt: Delete the ingredient "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
data.ingredients.delete.blockers.heading: Cannot delete — referenced by:
data.ingredients.delete.blockers.otherRe: Other rows in the food schema (recipe lines, batches, or substitutions). Clear those first, then retry.
data.ingredients.delete.error.generic: Could not delete the ingredient. Please try again.
data.ingredients.recipeRefs.heading: Used by recipes
data.ingredients.recipeRefs.zero: Not referenced by any compiled recipe yet.

data.ingredients.variants.edit.title: Edit variant
data.ingredients.variants.form.name: Name
data.ingredients.variants.delete.title: Delete variant
data.ingredients.variants.delete.referen: Cannot delete — referenced by another row (a batch, a recipe line, an alias, or a substitution).
data.ingredients.variants.error.slugTake: A variant with that slug already exists under this ingredient.
data.ingredients.variants.error.invalidS: Slug must be lowercase letters, digits, and dashes.
data.ingredients.variants.error.generic: Could not save the variant. Please try again.
data.aliases.title: Aliases
data.aliases.description: Alternate names that resolve to a canonical ingredient or variant.
data.aliases.status.error: Failed to load aliases. Reload to retry.
data.aliases.status.empty: No aliases yet. Add one to get started.
data.aliases.add.title: Add alias
data.aliases.add.description: Create a new alias pointing at an ingredient or variant.
data.aliases.merge.title: Merge aliases
data.aliases.merge.description_one: Re-point {{count}} alias to a single canonical target.
data.aliases.merge.description_other: Re-point {{count}} aliases to a single canonical target.
data.aliases.picker.variantHint: Pick a variant to scope the alias more narrowly:
data.prepStates.title: Prep states
data.prepStates.description: Knife and process modifiers like diced, sliced, or grated.
data.prepStates.status.error: Failed to load prep states. Reload to retry.
data.prepStates.columns.name: Name
data.prepStates.deleteDisabledTooltip: Deletion isn't available in v1. Recipe lines reference prep states; cascade analysis lands in a follow-up PRD.
data.prepStates.add.title: Add prep state
data.prepStates.add.description: Add a new prep state slug + name to the curated set.
data.substitutions.title: Substitutions
data.substitutions.description: Directed substitution edges between ingredients and variants.
data.substitutions.recipePickerHint: Recipe-scoped subs: paste a recipe id directly. A picker will arrive with PRD-119.
data.substitutions.create.heading: Add substitution
data.substitutions.filters.heading: Filters

data.substitutions.error.self: Cannot substitute an item with itself.
data.substitutions.error.scope: Scope and recipe id are inconsistent.
data.substitutions.error.endpoint: Each endpoint must pick exactly one of ingredient or variant.

data.conversions.title: Conversions
data.conversions.description: Unit and weight conversions used by the compile pipeline.
data.conversions.intro: Manage the unit conversions and per-ingredient weights that the recipe compile path uses to normalise quantities into grams, millilitres, and counts.
data.conversions.units.title: Unit conversions
data.conversions.units.description: Universal, context-free conversions like cup → ml or oz → g.
data.conversions.units.create.title: New unit conversion
data.conversions.units.edit.title: Edit conversion ({{from}} → {{to}})
data.conversions.units.error.duplicate: A conversion for this from/to pair already exists.
data.conversions.units.error.generic: Could not save the conversion. Please try again.
data.conversions.weights.title: Ingredient weights
data.conversions.weights.description: Per-ingredient "1 of this unit weighs X grams" entries.
data.conversions.weights.create.title: New ingredient weight
data.conversions.weights.edit.title: Edit weight ({{unit}})
data.conversions.weights.error.duplicate: A weight for this ingredient/variant/unit already exists.
data.conversions.weights.error.generic: Could not save the weight. Please try again.
editor.readOnlyBanner: This version is published. Create a new draft to edit.
editor.reorder.title: Reorder ingredients
editor.reorder.description: Drag-sort substitutes: use the arrows to move ingredients. Confirming renumbers @N references in step bodies.
hero.dropPrompt: Drop an image or tap to choose
hero.acceptHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP up to {{mb}} MB
renderer.notRendered.title: Recipe not yet compiled
renderer.notRendered.description: This recipe version has not been compiled successfully. Re-run compilation to see the cookbook view.

data.substitutions.graph.description: Force-directed view of every substitution edge.

prompts.title: Prompt templates
prompts.description: Read-only view of the AI prompts the food ingest pipeline uses.
prompts.editingHint: Prompts are defined in code and cannot be edited here. To change one, edit the matching constant under pillars/food/app/src/prompts/, bump the version, then redeploy.
inbox.rejected.empty: No rejected drafts. When you reject a draft, it’ll land here so you can recover if you change your mind.
inbox.rejected.undo.failure.NoRejectionR: Nothing to undo — this draft wasn’t rejected via the inbox.
inbox.rejected.undo.failure.ConcurrentPr: Another version was just promoted — refresh the tab.
inbox.failed.empty: No failed ingests. Worker problems will surface here with a Retry button.
inbox.failed.viewSource.title: Original ingest source
inbox.failed.viewSource.description: Source media for failed ingest ({{code}}). Read-only.
inbox.failed.viewSource.textPlaceholder: Open the inspector view to read the pasted text.

cook.shortfalls.option.partial: Consume what’s available + mark rest externally

cook.batchPicker.empty: No matching batches. Mark consumed externally instead.
cook.subPicker.section.title: Substitutions ({{count}})
cook.subPicker.empty: No substitutions available for this ingredient.
cook.modal.error.SubstitutionEdgeInvalid: That substitution is no longer available. Pick another.
inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.drafts.empty.none: Inbox is empty. Paste a recipe URL into the ingest dialog to populate it.
inbox.drafts.viewSource.description: Source media for this draft. Read-only.
cook.modal.title: Mark cooked: {{recipeTitle}}
cook.modal.toast.success.fridge: Cooked. Batch added to the fridge.
cook.modal.toast.success.freezer: Cooked. Batch added to the freezer.
cook.modal.toast.success.pantry: Cooked. Batch added to the pantry.
cook.modal.error.RecipeNotCompiled: Recipe must be compiled before cooking.
cook.modal.error.PlanEntryNotFound: Plan entry not found — refresh and try again.
cook.modal.error.PlanEntryAlreadyCooked: This plan entry has already been cooked.
cook.modal.error.YieldRequired: Yield details required for this recipe.
cook.modal.error.YieldForbidden: This recipe doesn’t yield a batch.
cook.modal.error.BadScaleFactor: Scale factor must be greater than 0.
cook.modal.error.ShortfallUnresolved: Some ingredients can’t be covered — resolve shortfalls first.
inbox.inspector.noDraft: No draft yet — the worker is still processing this ingest.
inbox.inspector.provenance.videoUnsuppor: Your browser can’t play this clip.
inbox.inspector.provenance.caption: Caption
inbox.inspector.provenance.crashFallback: Source meta couldn’t be loaded. The editor and decision panes are still live.
inbox.inspector.renderer.unavailable: Renderer unavailable — fix compile errors first.
inbox.inspector.decision.noDraft: Pending — no draft to review yet.
inbox.inspector.decision.autoCreate.head: Will auto-create ({{count}})
inbox.inspector.decision.approve.title: Approve this draft?
inbox.inspector.decision.approve.descrip: It will become the current version of {{slug}}.
inbox.inspector.decision.approve.disable: Fix compile errors or quality issues first.
inbox.inspector.decision.approve.error.N: This draft isn’t from an ingest — approve via the recipe page.
inbox.inspector.decision.approve.error.C: Another tab approved this first — refresh.
inbox.inspector.decision.reject.title: Reject this draft?
inbox.inspector.decision.reject.error.No: This draft isn’t from an ingest.
Note required when reason is Other.
inbox.inspector.decision.rerun.authDeadT: Refresh Instagram cookies via the runbook, then re-run.
